LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BURLINGTON INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 AND 4, OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF STILL HAS NOT IDENTIFIED WHO MADE THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATION, ESPECIALLY THE ORAL ONES, TO WHOM THEY WERE MADE, WHEN THEY WERE MADE, OR EXACTLY WHAT THEY WERE. PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE ONE FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS TO PLEAD CAUSE OF ACTION 3 AND 4 WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- DEFENDANT BURLINGTON INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 AND 4, OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF STILL HAS NOT IDENTIFIED WHO MADE THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATION, ESPECIALLY THE ORAL ONES, TO WHOM THEY WERE MADE, WHEN THEY WERE MADE, OR EXACTLY WHAT THEY WERE. PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE ONE FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS TO PLEAD CAUSE OF ACTION 3 AND 4 WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
